name: QA 1330
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1330

pmdaopenmetrics scalability testing

specifically scaling number of metrics per nodes



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
